summary: Backend testing of Notification System APIs completed. All 18 tests pass (100%). All notification CRUD operations working correctly.

minor.issue: Notification has both 'read' and 'is_read' fields which could cause confusion. Currently 'read' is used for filtering, 'is_read' appears to be legacy.

critical_code_review_comments: Notification APIs are correctly implemented with proper CRUD operations
create_notification helper function correctly sets both user_id and user_uid for compatibility
Both 'read' and 'is_read' fields are being set to support different query patterns
Bell icon in NotificationBell.js correctly uses data-testid='notification-bell' for testing
Unread count badge shows when unreadCount > 0 with purple glow animation

test_credentials.note: This user exists in notifications collection but may not be in users collection (notifications still work)

seed_data_creation: Test notifications created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Notification System Backend Tests - Iteration 54:

All 18 tests pass:

1. TestNotificationAPIs:
   - test_get_user_notifications: PASS
   - test_get_notifications_with_pagination: PASS
   - test_get_notifications_unread_only: PASS
   - test_get_unread_count: PASS
   - test_get_unread_count_nonexistent_user: PASS (returns 0)
   - test_send_notification_to_user: PASS
   - test_send_notification_without_user_uid: PASS (returns 400)
   - test_send_notification_with_action_url: PASS
   - test_mark_notification_as_read: PASS
   - test_mark_nonexistent_notification_as_read: PASS (returns 404)
   - test_mark_all_notifications_as_read: PASS
   - test_delete_notification: PASS
   - test_delete_nonexistent_notification: PASS (returns 404)
   - test_broadcast_notification: PASS (sent to 207 users)
   - test_broadcast_to_specific_plan: PASS

2. TestNotificationFields:
   - test_notification_has_required_fields: PASS

3. TestNotificationEdgeCases:
   - test_empty_notification_list: PASS
   - test_notification_types: PASS

API Endpoints Verified:
- GET /api/notifications/{uid} - Returns notifications with pagination
- GET /api/notifications/{uid}/unread-count - Returns unread count
- PUT /api/notifications/{notification_id}/read - Marks single as read
- PUT /api/notifications/{uid}/read-all - Marks all as read
- DELETE /api/notifications/{notification_id} - Deletes notification
- POST /api/notifications/send - Sends to specific user (requires user_uid)
- POST /api/notifications/broadcast - Broadcasts to all or target_plan users

Notification Fields:
- notification_id (uuid)
- user_id / user_uid (user identifier)
- title, message, type, icon
- action_url (optional clickable link)
- read, is_read (boolean)
- created_at, read_at (timestamps)

Test user USR90a2c37d has 1 notification (welcome message, already read).
